nodes.name: Crested malimbe
nodes.summary: The crested malimbe (Malimbus malimbicus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is native to the African tropical rainforest. References External links Crested malimbe - Species text in Weaver Watch.
nodes.shortSummary: The crested malimbe (Malimbus malimbicus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is native to the African tropical rainforest.
locations: 熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林

nodes.name: Malimbus
nodes.summary: Malimbus（Malimbus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如Red-crowned malimbe、Rachel's malimbe、Red-vented malimbe等9种鸟类。
